meaning: adj.可捕捉的,可夺取的,可扣押的
examples: Adds a seizable entity to your data flow diagram.
UI: Fragments and content loaders, action bar, seizable home screen widgets, rich notifications, multi-selection drag&drop clipboard.
It spurs the police to pay more attention to cases that are likely to involve seizable assets (such as drug busts) and less attention to other ones.
